name: firefox-vault
description: Firefox WebExtension password-manager workflow backed by HashiCorp Vault KV.

scripts.web-ext:run: npm run build && web-ext run --source-dir dist
scripts.web-ext:run:windows: npm run build && web-ext run --source-dir dist --firefox '/mnt/c/Program Files/Mozilla Firefox/firefox.exe'
scripts.web-ext:build: npm run build && web-ext build --source-dir dist --overwrite-dest
scripts.web-ext:lint: npm run build && web-ext lint --source-dir dist
scripts.release:local: npm run web-ext:lint && npm run web-ext:build
